topUserComplaints: Every existing NPC wiki/database is bloated with intrusive ads, auto-play videos, and embeds, making mobile use a nightmare.
Data is scattered across multiple pages or outdated for the latest game patches; filtering by location, drop, schedule, or dialogue is absent.
There is no way to download raw NPC data (JSON/CSV) for modding or personal projects, and no API exists.
Interactive features like spawn maps, quest checklists, and schedule timers are missing; users are stuck with static tables.
recommendedAngles: Create a mobile-first, PWA NPC database with zero ads, fast text search, and an offline mode that syncs game data via community contributions or official APIs.
Offer a developer-friendly REST API and daily JSON dumps covering multiple games, monetized via a freemium model (free for small projects, paid for commercial use).
Build interactive NPC schedule/quest tracker tools (checklist, map, timer) with a clean UI that embeds no external media and respects user data limits.
Fill the app store gap by releasing a lightweight, subscription-free iOS/Android app that focuses solely on NPC location and loot with push notifications for daily in-game events.
